assets.title: Album of watercolors of Asian fruits and flowers — page 603998 (Pistillaria plate)
assets.alt: Album of watercolors of Asian fruits and flowers, page 603998 — Pistillaria plate, watercolour on paper, between 1798 and 1850.
assets.caption: BHL item 318921 第 603998 页：一份 18—19 世纪的水彩植物图谱。观察者需要决定保留哪些视觉信息。
assets.credit_line: Album of watercolors of Asian fruits and flowers (page 603998) / Biodiversity Heritage Library / Public domain
assets.viewing_note: 图片以 WebP 形式从 BHL /pageimage/ 端点下载。可放大查看细节。

assets.title: Album of watercolors of Asian fruits and flowers — page 603962 (Cycas revoluta plate)
assets.alt: Album of watercolors of Asian fruits and flowers, page 603962 — Cycas revoluta plate, watercolour on paper, between 1798 and 1850. PD subset only.
assets.caption: BHL item 318921 第 603962 页：另一页水彩植物图谱。本页只属于 Public-domain 子集；同 item 的 CC BY-NC-SA 子集仍被 blocked-from-import。
assets.credit_line: Album of watercolors of Asian fruits and flowers (page 603962) / Biodiversity Heritage Library / Public domain (PD subset only)
assets.viewing_note: 本页是 PD subset only。BHL 同 item 的 CC BY-NC-SA 子集仍被排除，引用时不得越过 page-level copyright 边界。

assets.title: Aconitum bulbilliferum Hand.-Mazz. (Ranunculaceae, Type fragment)
assets.institution: Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History / NMNH Botany
assets.alt: Smithsonian NMNH Botany specimen, US Catalog 1529703 — Aconitum bulbilliferum Hand.-Mazz. (Ranunculaceae, Type fragment), 90x90 PNG thumbnail.
assets.caption: NMNH Botany US Catalog 1529703：Aconitum bulbilliferum 标本的低分辨率缩略图。该端点返回 90×90 PNG，机构数据级 CC0 1.0。
assets.credit_line: Aconitum bulbilliferum Hand.-Mazz., Handel-Mazzetti 5202, 17 Sep 1914 / Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History, US Catalog 1529703 / Smithsonian Open Access (CC0 1.0, dataset-level)
assets.viewing_note: 低分辨率（90×90）缩略图。页面不得将其作为大幅背景或宽屏展示；不得强制放大；不得启用 lightbox。请作为机构元数据与命名秩序的对照点，而非视觉证据。

assets.title: [Botanical Specimen: Fern]
assets.alt: [Botanical Specimen: Fern], 1855–60 / The Metropolitan Museum of Art, accession 2003.562.3. Public domain.
assets.caption: 大都会博物馆 285149：Botanical Specimen: Fern。Met Collection API isPublicDomain=true，且公开页面显示了 Public Domain 指示（double-confirmation PASS）。
assets.credit_line: [Botanical Specimen: Fern], 1855–60 / The Metropolitan Museum of Art, Gift of Russell C. Vail, 2003 (2003.562.3) / Public domain
assets.viewing_note: 使用 web-large 派生（449×624 JPEG），原图 URL 仍可达。Double-confirmation PASS：API + public page Public Domain 指示。

assets.title: Zeestreepvaren

assets.alt: Zeestreepvaren (Pteris), Anna Atkins, c. 1854 / Rijksmuseum, object RP-F-F80152. Cyanotype photogram on paper. Public domain / CC0 1.0.
assets.caption: Rijksmuseum RP-F-F80152：Zeestreepvaren。Anna Atkins 的蓝晒作品。Rijksmuseum 公开页面逐项标注版权为 Public domain（CC0 1.0）。

assets.title: Wolfsklauw

assets.alt: Wolfsklauw (Lycopodium), Anna Atkins, c. 1854 / Rijksmuseum, object RP-F-F80313. Cyanotype photogram on paper. Public domain / CC0 1.0.
assets.caption: Rijksmuseum RP-F-F80313：Wolfsklauw。Anna Atkins 的另一张蓝晒。Rijksmuseum IIIF Presentation API manifest /manifest.json 在本轮返回 404；manifest-based 证据未使用。

assets.viewing_note: Micrio IIIF Image API 1024px 派生。**Presentation API manifest 404 caveat**：本轮 IIIF Presentation API manifest /manifest.json 返回 HTTP 404；不得基于 manifest 撰写陈述。
